name: Tool-Call Budget
description: The number of tool calls in a single workflow must stay within the per-workflow budget. Budget shown as 20; set per deployment.
rationale: Amber / flag: approaching the tool-call budget is a near-miss that should notify human oversight and increment the session-level escalation counter, short of a halt.

examples.passes: a workflow with 8 tool calls under a budget of 20
examples.fails: a workflow that exceeds its tool-call budget

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
